team.pageDescription: Invite teammates and decide who can see each hunt.
team.emptyMembers: You're the only person on this team right now.

changeRoleDialog.title: Change role for {{name}}
changeRoleDialog.description: This controls company-wide permissions. Per-hunt access is managed separately.
changeRoleDialog.adminHint: Sees and acts on every hunt in the company and can manage the team. (Billing stays with the owner.)
changeRoleDialog.managerHint: Starts with no access — you share specific hunts and pick collaborator (can act) or viewer (read-only) for each.

manageHuntsDialog.title: Hunt access for {{name}}
manageHuntsDialog.description: Pick the access level for each hunt. Changes save automatically.
manageHuntsDialog.legend: Collaborator can act on the hunt (message candidates, change their status, run the hunt); Viewer is read-only.
manageHuntsDialog.noHunts: Your company has no hunts yet.

invite.title: Invite teammate
invite.adminHint: Can manage the team and see and act on every hunt in the company. (Only the owner handles billing.)
invite.managerHint: See only the hunts you share with them — for each hunt you pick collaborator (can act) or viewer (read-only).

team.confirmRemove: Remove this member from the team?

hunts.subUserEmptyState: No hunts shared with you yet. The main account at {{brand}} can share a hunt with you from the hunt page.

huntAccess.roleCollaboratorHint: Can act on this hunt — message candidates, change their status, and manage the hunt (activate, pause, complete).
huntAccess.roleViewerHint: Read-only — can see the hunt and candidates but can't message or change anything.
huntAccess.readonlyTooltip: You have read-only access to this hunt.
huntAccess.viewerNoUsers: Everyone on the team already has access — invite more teammates from Settings → Team.
huntAccess.noTeammatesYet: You don't have any teammates yet. Invite people to your team from Settings → Team, and they'll appear here once they accept.

shareLink.title: Generate share link
shareLink.copyHint: Copy the link below — it's only shown once.

publicShare.expiredTitle: This link is no longer active
publicShare.expiredBody: Ask the person who shared it with you to resend.

account.scheduleCall: Schedule a quick call with our team to activate your account.

help.title: Need Assistance?
help.feedbackPlaceholder: Let us know how we can improve or help you…

payment.requiresAction: We need extra verification on your card. Check your email for a confirmation link.

huntSubscription.pendingDescription: Activate it to start reaching candidates. You'll be charged {{amount}} {{currency}}/month while this headhunt is active.
huntSubscription.pendingDescriptionNoFee: Activate it to start reaching candidates.
huntSubscription.dialogDescription: Starting this headhunt begins its monthly subscription, charged to the card on file. Stop the headhunt anytime to stop billing.
huntSubscription.pausedDescription: Billing keeps running at {{amount}} {{currency}}/month while it's paused. Reactivate it, or end it to stop billing.
huntSubscription.pausedDescriptionNoFee: Billing keeps running while it's paused. Reactivate it, or end it to stop billing.

companyStats.title: Company Overview
companyStats.noHuntsDescription: Company stats will appear here once you have active hunts.
companyStats.planEndedNotice: Your plan has ended. The stats shown are from your previous plan period.

subUser.welcomeSubtitle: Below you'll find the hunts shared with you by the account holder, {{holder}}.
subUser.welcomeContact: If you need to edit, add, or change anything, please contact {{holder}} or reach out to us using the help button.

searchView.searchPlaceholder: I am looking for two General Practitioners from the UK with MRCGP qualifications who speak English. The salary for a full-time position is $300,000 per year.
searchView.noMatchesDescription: We couldn't find any healthcare workers matching your criteria. Try adjusting your search parameters or broadening your requirements.
searchView.pleaseSelectCandidate: Please select at least one candidate

workersResults.chooseProfiles: Choose up to 10 favorite profiles to help refine your recommendations. Based on your selection, our AI agent will analyze, score, and find similar profiles. This ensures we make the best offers to the most suitable candidates, saving you time and effort in the hiring process!

workerDialog.loadingError: Failed to load worker data. Please try again.

candidateChat.title: Candidate Conversation
candidateChat.noMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
candidateChat.privateSummaryNote: Private summary — candidate can't see this
candidateChat.closed: Messaging is closed — this candidate has been declined or rejected.
candidateChat.documentError: Could not open the document. Please try again.

chatWindowPricing.title: AI Recruitment Automation
chatWindowPricing.description: Once activated, our AI Agent automatically sends personalized job offers to candidates when they're most likely to respond.

timezone.title: Timezone Intelligence
timezone.description: Analyzes user timezones for optimal engagement

ai.title: AI-Powered Personalization
ai.description: Tailored messages based on candidate profiles

engagement.title: Automated Engagement
engagement.description: Maximizes response rates through smart timing

chatWindowPricing.activateMessage: Activate to automate recruitment while you focus on evaluating qualified candidates.

interestedWorkerDialog.title: Interested Candidate
interestedWorkerDialog.loading: Failed to load candidate data. Please try again.

newnessGate.title: Is this candidate new to your pipeline?
newnessGate.description: Before we share {{firstName}}'s contact details, please confirm you do not already have them in your pipeline through another agency or channel. Every confirmation is logged.
newnessGate.confirmButton: Yes, this candidate is new to us
newnessGate.confirmedToast: Confirmed. Contact details are now visible.
newnessGate.errorToast: Could not confirm. Please try again.
newnessGate.contactHidden: Open candidate to confirm and reveal contact

contactWithheld.title: Contact details withheld
contactWithheld.description: This candidate has been declined or rejected, so their contact details are no longer available and messaging is closed.

interestedWorkerDialog.offerMadeTooltip: Indicates you have contacted the candidate, conducted an interview and made a formal offer.
interestedWorkerDialog.hiredTooltip: Indicates the deal is complete and the candidate will start working with your company.
interestedWorkerDialog.declineTooltip: Indicates there's no match or you couldn't reach an agreement with the candidate.

questionsInHunt.noQuestionsDesc: Questions from candidates will appear here. These help build context for future interactions.
questionsInHunt.question: Question

screeningQuestions.title: Screening questions
screeningQuestions.subtitle: Questions our AI agent will weave into every candidate conversation. Required ones gate the recruiter handoff.

intro.title: What this is
intro.body: These questions help our AI agent filter for fit before passing candidates to the agency. Required questions must be answered before the handoff is allowed; non-required questions are still asked but don't block.

empty.title: No screening questions yet
empty.body: Add a question below and our AI agent will start asking it in every candidate conversation for this hunt.

fields.question: Question
fields.questionPlaceholder: e.g. Why do you want to move?
fields.rationale: Why we ask (private — shown only to our AI agent)
fields.rationalePlaceholder: Optional — gives our AI agent context

template.documents: Have you looked into the documents you'll need?
template.motivation: Why do you want to move?
template.destination: Where in Australia do you want to move?
template.on_trip_meeting: Would you like to meet us during the trip?

searchHistory.title: Recent Searches
searchHistory.noHistoryDesc: Your search history will appear here

chatWindow.activationNeeded: This plan type needs to be activated first in your account settings.
chatWindow.addCustomRequirements: Add any custom requirements or clarifications that weren't covered by the questions above.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Manage your account settings and preferences
profile.calendarLinkPlaceholder: Enter your calendar link (e.g. google calendar, cal.com, calendly )

company.title: Company Settings
company.subTitle: Manage your company profile and business details
company.logoInstructions: Drag and drop an image, or click to browse
company.logoHint: PNG, JPG, WEBP, or SVG up to 5MB

terms.title: Accept Terms and Privacy Policy
terms.description: To continue using Scrubin, please review and accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
terms.privacy_prefix: I have read and accept the

pricing.title: Choose Your Recruitment Plan
pricing.subtitle: Flexible pricing designed for healthcare organisations of all sizes — from small GP clinics to large groups or hospitals. Every plan includes verified candidates, AI-assisted sourcing, and smart matching based on both sides' wants, needs, preferences, skills, and role requirements.

startingFee.title: Start with {{amount}} {{currency}}
startingFee.withFee: Begin recruiting with a {{amount}} {{currency}} starting fee
startingFee.withoutFee: Begin recruiting immediately with no upfront costs or commitments
startingFee.payWhenSuccessful: Pay success fees only on successful hire

availablePlans.title: Available Plans
availablePlans.successFeeNotice: Success fee is paid in split payment: 50% when candidate signs, 50% when they start

customSolutions.title: CUSTOM SOLUTIONS
customSolutions.description: Need something specific? Or do you need locum or short-term placements? Contact us for tailored recruitment packages with premium benefits and competitive rates

page.title: Custom Healthcare Recruitment
page.subtitle: Tailored solutions for your healthcare staffing needs with flexible pricing and dedicated support

feature1.title: The Largest Healthcare Worker Database in Europe
feature1.description: Access to tens of thousands of healthcare professionals - from general nurses to specialized doctors. We cover all fields and experience levels your organization may need.

feature2.title: Data-Driven Approach
feature2.description: Our AI-powered recruitment agent analyzes candidates' job preferences, past behavior, psychological profiles, and statistical data to understand each professional’s desires and patterns.

feature3.title: AI-Powered Recruitment Agent Working Around the Clock
feature3.description: A smart AI agent searches for candidates who meet your criteria, holds initial conversations at times that suit them, and schedules meetings or video calls between you and the candidates – all automatically, 24/7.

feature4.title: A Smart Investment That Increases Your Revenue
feature4.description: Investing in our software means faster access to suitable doctors and healthcare professionals – which leads to more filled positions, higher service capacity, and revenue growth. Our solutions are designed to make your recruitment efforts deliver measurable business results.

contactForm.title: Contact Us
contactForm.description: Tell us about your specific recruitment needs and we'll get back to you shortly.
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your specific recruitment needs...

cardManagement.title: Payment Methods
cardManagement.manageCardsDescription: Add, remove, or set your default payment method
cardManagement.noCardsSelector: No saved cards. Add one to continue.
cardManagement.addCardDescription: Enter your card details. We'll verify your card with your bank — you may see a 3D Secure prompt. No charge will be made.
cardManagement.secureInfo: Your card details are encrypted and never stored on our servers.
cardManagement.cannotRemoveLast: Cannot remove the only payment method
cardManagement.verifyFailed: Card verification failed. Please try again or use a different card.

planSelection.paymentInfo: Split payment: 50% when candidate signs, 50% when they start
planSelection.terms: By confirming, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
planSelection.acceptTerms: I have read and agree to the
planSelection.vatAdded: VAT will be added to prices
planSelection.customDescription: Contact us to discuss your specific requirements and get a tailored plan.
planSelection.confirmDescription: We will charge you {{amount}} {{currency}} each month for this plan.
planSelection.confirmDescriptionFree: Your card is required for verification only. You will not be charged today — we charge a success fee only when you make a successful hire.

planDescriptions.riskFreeStarter: Perfect for trying our service with no upfront cost. Pay only when you hire.
planDescriptions.smartPlan: Balanced approach with moderate upfront cost and competitive success fees.
planDescriptions.superPlan: Premium service with higher upfront investment and lower success fees.

enterprise.customPricingDescription: Tailored pricing based on your specific needs and requirements.
enterprise.dedicatedSupportDescription: Personal account manager and priority support.

contactDialog.title: Contact Us
contactDialog.description: Choose how you would like to get in touch about Enterprise solutions.
contactDialog.messagePlaceholder: Tell us briefly about your needs

planDescriptionsStatic.starter: For small clinics hiring 1–2 doctors or nurses a year.
planDescriptionsStatic.smart: For growing clinics with regular hiring needs.
planDescriptionsStatic.enterprise: For healthcare organisations (10+ hires per year).

UK.paymentSchedule: 50% upon candidate confirmation, 50% upon start date
UK.installments: Success fee may be billed in full or flexible up to £500 installments
UK.taxInfo: All prices exclude VAT if purchased as a UK business

AU.paymentSchedule: 50% upon candidate signing, 50% upon start date
AU.installments: Success fee may be billed in full or flexible $2,500 installments
AU.taxInfo: All prices exclude GST if purchased as an Australian business

EE.paymentSchedule: 50% upon candidate confirmation, 50% upon start date
EE.installments: Success fee may be billed in full or flexible up to €500 installments

OTHER.paymentSchedule: 50% upon candidate confirmation, 50% upon start date
OTHER.installments: Success fee may be billed in full or flexible up to €500 installments
OTHER.taxInfo: All prices exclude VAT if purchased as an EU business

planSelection.monthlyAccountFeeDescription: Monthly subscription fee for platform access and features
planSelection.successFeeDescription: One-time fee paid only when you successfully hire a candidate

fixed.name: Fixed
fixed.description: A budget-friendly start for when a success fee is out of reach.
fixed.noChargeToday: You won't be charged today — billing starts when you activate a headhunt.
fixed.confirmDescription: Your card is needed for verification only — you won't be charged today. Billing of {{amount}} {{currency}} per month per active headhunt starts when you activate a headhunt.
fixed.bulletPerHunt: One monthly price per active headhunt — run two headhunts, pay twice the monthly fee. Stop a headhunt anytime to stop its billing.
fixed.bulletOutreachPace: A steady, measured outreach pace each month — focused, considered candidate outreach rather than full-speed mass hunting
fixed.bulletVariedCandidates: A varied selection of interested candidates from each headhunt
fixed.bulletNoHiringFees: No hiring fees — no success fee per hire

customPlan.title: Your custom plan
customPlan.confirmDescription: Accept the terms to activate this plan. It becomes active immediately — no card needed, fees are invoiced manually.

enterpriseCard.customAgreement: Custom agreement tailored to your organisation
enterpriseCard.description: Our most powerful way to hire — full-speed search and unlimited candidates, with zero risk: you only pay when someone is actually hired.
enterpriseCard.successFee: Pay only when you actually hire — no hire, no fee
enterpriseCard.fullSpeed: Full-speed headhunting — no monthly limit on candidate outreach
enterpriseCard.unlimitedCandidates: Unlimited candidates — every interested candidate the search produces

toast.subscriptionPending: Subscription is being finalized. This may take a moment.
toast.subscriptionCancelled: Subscription cancelled. You can try again anytime.
toast.invoicePending: Subscription created. We'll send your first invoice shortly.
toast.messageSent: Message sent! We will get back to you shortly.
toast.planAlreadyActive: You already have an active plan. Refresh the page to see it.
toast.customPlanActivated: Your custom plan is now active!
